text.title: Agentic RAG Self-Correction Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from baseline hallucination assessment to wired self-correction loop.

step.name: confirm-hallucination-rate
step.input: baseline eval set with faithfulness labels

step.name: pick-verifier
step.action: Choose verifier model distinct from generator. If only one model, use temperature 0.0 + auditor framing prompt.

step.name: wire-generate-verify
step.action: Loop: generate → verify(answer, chunks). Verifier returns count of ungrounded claims.

step.name: enforce-cap-and-trace
step.action: On cap reached without ≤max_ungrounded_claims, write full trace; return `needs_human_review=true`.
